an1.209:1.1: "Foremost among my *bhikkhu* disciples who are eager for training is Rāhula.
an1.210:1.1: … Among those who went forth out of faith is Raṭṭhapāla.
an1.211:1.1: … Among those who draw the first lot is Kuṇḍadhāna.
an1.212:1.1: … Among those endowed with inspiration is Vaṅgīsa.
an1.213:1.1: … Among those who inspire confidence on all sides is Upasena Vaṅgantaputta.
an1.214:1.1: … Among those who arrange lodgings is Dabba Mallaputta.
an1.215:1.1: … Among those who are dear and beloved to *devatās* is Pilindavaccha.
an1.216:1.1: … Among those who are quick to understand is Bāhiya Dārucīriya.
an1.217:1.1: … Among those who speak in detail about the mind [*citta*] is Kumārakassapa.
an1.218:1.1: … Among those who have attained analytical knowledge is Mahākoṭṭhita."
